nasb.text: “Arise, go to Nineveh the great city and proclaim to it the proclamation which I am going to tell you.”

esv.text: “Arise, go to Nineveh, that great city, and call out against it the message that I tell you.”

cnv.text: “起來！到尼尼微大城去，向其中的居民宣告我所吩咐你的話。”

ccb.text: “你起身前往尼尼微大城，向那里的居民宣告我先前吩咐你的话。”

csbs.text: “起来！到尼尼微大城去，向那城宣告我告诉你的信息！”
